_publications._publicationTitle: STING activation reprograms the microenvironment to sensitize NF1-related malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for immunotherapy.

_contextSnippet: IHC revealed that treatment with the STING agonists increased infiltration of CD3+ T cells, CD4+ Th cells, and CD8+ cytotoxic T cells
details: Successfully detected increased infiltration of CD4+ Th cells into tumors after STING agonist treatment
